untranslatable_reason: AADT pattern requires identification of two distinct ascending peaks followed by descending move, which demands multi-bar pattern recognition across 3+ bars with specific sequencing (higher high, then another higher high, then lower high). The measure rule target calculation (lowest low between two tops → pattern height ÷ 2 → subtract from lowest low) requires explicit peak/trough detection not available in indicator-only format. Standard indicators cannot reliably identify the precise two-top structure or compute the geometric measure rule target.
